gaps.snippet: # [doc = " One row of the module guarantee matrix (RFC-0016 §4.5): an exported item, its"] # [doc = " honest guarantee tag, whether it is fallible (and the explicit error shape), its"] # [doc = " declared effects, and whether it exposes an EXPLAIN artifact."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , Copy , PartialEq , Eq)] pub struct GuaranteeRow { # [doc = " The exported op / item name."] pub op : & 'static str , # [doc = " Its honest guarantee tag on the lattice `Exact ⊐ Proven ⊐ Empirical ⊐ Declared`."] pub tag : GuaranteeStrength , # [doc = " The explicit fallibility: `\"total\"`, or the `Option`/`Result` shape returned."] pub fallibility : & 'static str , # [doc = " Declared effects (`\"none\"` for this pure re-export surface)."] pub effects : & 'static str , # [doc = " Whether the item surfaces an inspectable EXPLAIN artifact."] pub explainable : bool , }
gaps.reason: struct `GuaranteeRow` uses named fields and references a type not resolvable in-file — emitting it positionally would introduce an unresolved reference that poisons the file's `myc check`; left gapped under the M-1006 resolvability gate (VR-5/G2)

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The `std.core` guarantee matrix (spec §4). Every row is `Exact` and effect-free:"] # [doc = " `std.core` introduces no operation that selects, converts, or approximates, so the"] # [doc = " honest tag for each is `Exact` (RFC-0016 §4.1 C2) — the honest *floor*, not an"] # [doc = " upgrade. The query rows that surface a downstream value's own tag/bound/provenance"] # [doc = " are marked EXPLAIN-able (they are the inspection window, RFC-0001 §4.8)."] pub const GUARANTEE_MATRIX : & [GuaranteeRow] = & [GuaranteeRow { op : "Value/Repr/Meta (type re-exports)" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "total" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "CoreValue/Datum (type re-exports)" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "total" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "GuaranteeStrength (lattice tags)" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "total" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "Bound/BoundBasis (type re-exports)" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "total" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "repr_of" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "Option<&Repr> (None for algebraic data)" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "meta_of" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "Option<&Meta> (None for algebraic data)" , effects : "none" , explainable : false , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "guarantee_of" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "total" , effects : "none" , explainable : true , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "bound_of" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "Option<&Bound> (None when no meta/bound)" , effects : "none" , explainable : true , } , GuaranteeRow { op : "provenance_of" , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , fallibility : "Option<&Provenance> (None for algebraic data)" , effects : "none" , explainable : true , } ,] ;
